questions: tell me about lab grown meat
lab meat ki safe khawar jonno?
lab grown meat er future ki?
answers: Lab-grown meat, also called cultured meat, is real animal meat produced by cultivating animal cells in a lab instead of raising and slaughtering animals. It tastes like conventional meat.
Lab grown meat holo real animal cell theke lab e grow kora meat. Kono prani ke marte hoy na. Cell sample niye bioreactor e meat grow kora hoy.
Cultured meat could dramatically reduce the environmental impact of meat production — using up to 96% less land, 96% less water, and producing 96% fewer greenhouse gas emissions.
Companies like Upside Foods and Eat Just have received regulatory approval in some countries. The technology is advancing rapidly, though scaling up production and reducing costs remain challenges.
